sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64166" key="*lurai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Λῠραῖος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of Hermes as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔφορος μουσικῆς</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.195" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.195</biblScope> </bibl> C.</entryFree>
